relationships: ber:Nekk seg Tmurt n Yizwawen. Ta d tamnaḍt d-yusan deg Dzayer
ber:Nekk seg Tmurt n Leqbayel. Ta d tamnaḍt d-yusan deg Dzayer
ber:Tamurt n Leqbayel, yellan deg Lezzayer, d tamnaḍt tahuskayt
ber:Tamurt n Leqbayel, yellan deg Lezzayer, d tamnaḍt tucbiḥt
ber:Dzayer ur tesεi ara tamnaḍt ideg yella urmud abulkanan
ber:Tamurt n Leqbayel, yellan deg Lezzayer, d tamnaḍt icebḥen
